skills.name: api-testing-recipes
skills.trigger: API QA, endpoint testing, HTTP recipe generation
skills.expected_output: A selected API testing recipe and evidence path for the active stack.

skills.name: docker-compose-recipes
skills.trigger: Docker Compose service selection or local infrastructure setup
skills.expected_output: A selected service recipe and composition guidance.

skills.name: dw-cli-run
skills.trigger: Fire an AI CLI (Codex/Claude/Copilot) in a dedicated git worktree to implement a prepared prompt; resumable per-task session; STOP for the gate
skills.expected_output: Audit-logged run with a 0-10 dual evaluation, a resumable session-id sidecar, and a STOP-for-gate Structured Return.

skills.name: dw-codebase-intel
skills.trigger: Codebase indexing or codebase intelligence query
skills.expected_output: .dw/intel index files or a cited answer from the index.

skills.name: dw-council
skills.trigger: Council mode or high-impact architectural debate
skills.expected_output: Advisor positions, tension synthesis, and decision recommendation.

skills.name: dw-debug-protocol
skills.trigger: Bugfix, QA fix loop, or non-reproducible failure
skills.expected_output: Six-step triage, root cause, guard, and verification path.

skills.name: dw-execute-phase
skills.trigger: Task execution, plan-checking, waves, checkpoint recovery
skills.expected_output: Plan-check verdict, wave execution report, or checkpoint summary.

skills.name: dw-git-discipline
skills.trigger: Commit creation, branch hygiene, PR generation
skills.expected_output: Atomic commit plan and git hygiene checks.

skills.name: dw-incident-response
skills.trigger: Production critical bug, outage, incident, SEV workflow
skills.expected_output: Incident triage, communication, resolution, and postmortem artifacts.

skills.name: dw-llm-eval
skills.trigger: AI, LLM, RAG, classifier, agent, or tool-use feature
skills.expected_output: Eval strategy, oracle choice, dataset requirements, and result checks.

skills.name: dw-memory
skills.trigger: Task execution memory, checkpointing, compaction
skills.expected_output: Updated workflow memory and task-local memory guidance.

skills.name: dw-minimalism
skills.trigger: Before writing new code, infrastructure, or abstractions: YAGNI decision ladder and lite/full/ultra intensity
skills.expected_output: A minimalism verdict (build/reuse/inline/skip) with the ladder rung that justified it.

skills.name: dw-review-rigor
skills.trigger: Code review, implementation review, or review consolidation
skills.expected_output: Deduplicated findings ordered by defensible severity.

skills.name: dw-search-first
skills.trigger: New dependency, integration, MCP server, helper, or abstraction
skills.expected_output: Adopt/wrap/compose/build decision with checked search channels.

skills.name: dw-silent-failure
skills.trigger: Swallowed errors, dangerous fallbacks, retries, async detachment
skills.expected_output: Concrete silent-failure findings or an explicit pass.

skills.name: dw-simplification
skills.trigger: Refactor analysis, code smells, complexity, or behavior-preserving simplification
skills.expected_output: Simplification target, risk, behavior-preserving checks, and recommendation.

skills.name: dw-source-grounding
skills.trigger: Library/framework/API decision, technical research, dependency audit
skills.expected_output: Cited source-grounded decision with version and retrieval date.

skills.name: dw-testing-discipline
skills.trigger: Writing, reviewing, or debugging tests
skills.expected_output: Test placement, invariant, anti-pattern checks, and verification guidance.

skills.name: dw-ui-discipline
skills.trigger: UI design, redesign, visual QA, accessibility, or frontend polish
skills.expected_output: Grounding answers, state matrix, accessibility checks, and visual risks.

skills.name: dw-verify
skills.trigger: Completion claim, commit, PR generation, or fixed bug status
skills.expected_output: Fresh verification report with cited command evidence.

skills.name: humanizer
skills.trigger: Editing AI-generated prose, README, docs, captions, marketing copy
skills.expected_output: Rewritten prose with AI-writing tells removed and voice preserved.

skills.name: remotion-best-practices
skills.trigger: Remotion video composition, captions, rendering, transitions, media assets
skills.expected_output: Selected Remotion rule references and implementation guidance.

skills.name: security-review
skills.trigger: Security review, sensitive code, OWASP checks, auth/payment/input surfaces
skills.expected_output: High-confidence security findings or explicit pass.

skills.name: vercel-react-best-practices
skills.trigger: React/Next.js performance, hydration, data fetching, bundle or render issues
skills.expected_output: Selected performance rule references and metric-driven recommendations.
